description: Recto: copy of a legal document, concerned with marital arrangements (for example the husband will not forbid his wife to visit her mother and brother). Verso: list of names such as Abū l-Khayr, Ibn Saʿd and Abū [...]. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
